login.title: Boora Ali
login.subtitle: Log places, visits, and experiences worth remembering.
login.sessionExpired: Your session was ended because you signed in on another device.
login.emailSent: Account created! Check your email to activate your account before signing in.
login.turnstileUnavailable: The security check did not load. Reload the page and try again.
login.emailNotVerified: Please verify your email before signing in. Check your inbox.

turnstile.error: Could not load the security check.

register.error: Could not register. Check your details.
register.turnstileUnavailable: The security check did not load. Reload the page and try again.
register.termsAccept: I have read and accept the
register.termsRequired: You must accept the Terms of Use and Privacy Policy to create an account.

verifyEmail.successSubtitle: Your account is active. You can now sign in.
verifyEmail.errorGeneric: Could not verify your email. Please try again.
verifyEmail.noToken: No verification token found. Use the link sent to your email.

places.title: Boora Ali
places.subtitle: Your personal place journal
places.search: Search by name, category, or note...

map.title: Places map
map.empty: No places have a saved location.

empty.title: No places yet
empty.description: Add your first place to get started.

emptySearch.title: No places found
emptySearch.description: Try another name, category, or note.

pwa.installAria: Install Boora Ali on this device
pwa.iosButtonAria: See how to install Boora Ali on iPhone or iPad
pwa.iosDescription: On iPhone and iPad, Boora Ali is installed from the browser menu. This button opens the instructions.
pwa.iosStepSafari: If you are using another browser, open this site in Safari first.
pwa.iosStepShare: Tap the Share button in Safari's toolbar.
pwa.iosStepAdd: Choose 'Add to Home Screen' and confirm.
pwa.iosStepFallback: If 'Add to Home Screen' is missing, scroll the list, tap 'Edit Actions', and enable it there.
pwa.androidDescription: On Android, Chrome may show the native install prompt or ask you to install from the browser menu.
pwa.androidStepInstall: Choose 'Install app' or 'Add to Home screen' and confirm.
pwa.androidStepFallback: If the option is missing, refresh the page and try again after it finishes loading.

account.title: Account
account.subtitle: Update your details, profile photo, and password.

delete.title: Danger zone
delete.description: Deleting your account will permanently remove all your places, visits, and data.
delete.grace: You have 7 days to change your mind — just log in again to cancel.
delete.error: Failed to request deletion. Please try again.
delete.scheduled: Account scheduled for deletion in 7 days. Log in again to cancel.

confirm.title: Delete account permanently?
confirm.description: Your account will be scheduled for deletion in 7 days. If you log in before then, it will be automatically reactivated.

placeDetail.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this place?
placeDetail.deleteConfirmRestore: You can restore it from the trash.
placeDetail.coordsPending: Coordinates are being processed. The map will appear soon.
placeDetail.coordsFailed: Could not extract coordinates. Edit the place and save again to retry.

consumables.title: Items summary
consumables.empty: Add a visit with items to track prices and average ratings.

placeForm.name: Name
placeForm.locationHint: Click to place the pin. Drag the map to adjust the area.
placeForm.geolocationUnavailable: Geolocation is not available on this device.
placeForm.geolocationError: Could not get your current location.
placeForm.extractCoords: Extract location from full Maps URL
placeForm.saveAndResolveMapsUrl: Save and process short Maps URL
placeForm.saveAndResolveMapsUrlHint: Short Maps URLs are saved and processed immediately.
placeForm.coordsNotFound: Coordinates not found in this URL. Use the full Google Maps URL.

sections.locationDescription: Address, Google Maps link, and map pin.
sections.notesDescription: What is worth remembering before coming back.
sections.photoDescription: Cover image to recognize this place quickly.

editPlace.title: Edit place
editPlace.coordsPending: Stay on this screen. When extraction finishes, you will be taken to the place automatically.
editPlace.coordsFailed: The Maps URL could not be resolved right now. Adjust the URL and save again.

visitForm.consumedDescription: Add each item with price, rating, and comments.

visitCard.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this visit? This action cannot be undone.

upload.invalidType: Format not allowed. Use JPEG, PNG or WEBP.

trash.title: Trash

trash.permanentDeleteMessage: This action cannot be undone. The place and all its data will be permanently removed.

collections.title: Collections
collections.delete_confirm: Delete this collection? Places will not be deleted.

share.login_to_import: Sign in or register to add

termsModal.title: Terms of Use
termsModal.description: To continue using Boora Ali, please read and accept our Terms of Use and Privacy Policy. You can open the documents below before accepting.
termsModal.accept: I have read and accept the Terms of Use and Privacy Policy
termsModal.disclaimer: By accepting, you confirm that you are at least 13 years old.
termsModal.error: Could not record your acceptance. Please try again.
